best_individual: mul(if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(0.191, protected_div(add(steepness, distance), 0.026)), 0.004), add(steepness, distance))

hall_of_fame.individual: mul(if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(0.191, protected_div(add(steepness, distance), 0.026)), 0.004), add(steepness, distance))
mul(if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(0.191, protected_div(if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.003), 0.026)), 0.004), add(steepness, distance))
mul(if_then_else(or_(is_water, is_water), protected_div(0.191, protected_div(distance, 0.026)), 0.004), add(steepness, distance))
mul(if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(sub(protected_div(0.464, 0.213), neg(0.632)), protected_div(distance, 0.012)), 0.031), add(steepness, distance))
